label: Nov–Dec 2023 Truce & Exchanges
short_summary: Four-day truce with extensions; Qatar-led mediation with secret US cell (McGurk/Geltzer). 105 hostages released (81 Israeli women/children + 24 foreign) for 240 Palestinian women/teen prisoners. Fighting resumed Dec 1.
hostage_counts_by_phase: Initial plan: 50 hostages / 150 prisoners; Day 1: 24 released / 39 prisoners; Ceasefire total: 105 / 240

label: Paris Framework (Jan–Mar 2024)
short_summary: Framework proposed 40-day pause at 10:1 ratio, hammered out by Burns/Barnea/Qatar PM/Kamel in Paris. Hamas sought 700–1,000 prisoners for women/children/elderly first stage. Israel called demands unrealistic. No execution.
hostage_counts_by_phase: Paris draft: 40 hostages proposed / ratio 10:1; Hamas March proposal: UNSPECIFIED / 700–1,000 proposed

label: Biden Three-Phase Plan (May–Jul 2024)
short_summary: Biden announced three-phase plan May 31; UNSC Resolution 2735 endorsed it 14-0-1 on June 10. Phase 1: six-week ceasefire + women/elderly/wounded for hundreds of prisoners + 600 trucks/day aid. Hamas welcomed UNSC language. Not fully executed.
hostage_counts_by_phase: Phase 1: UNSPECIFIED (women/elderly/wounded) / hundreds; Phase 2: UNSPECIFIED remaining living; Phase 3: UNSPECIFIED remains

label: Doha/Cairo Deadlock (Aug–Nov 2024)
short_summary: Talks stalled on Netzarim/Philadelphi corridor troop presence and prisoner exile terms. Egypt rejected Israeli troop presence along Philadelphi. Mass Israeli protests and labor strike after 6 hostages recovered dead. US warned Qatar Hamas Doha presence unacceptable after Hamas rejected proposal in Nov 2024.

label: Jan 2025 Ceasefire – Stage One
short_summary: Six-week stage one executed: 33 Israeli + 5 Thai hostages for ~2,000 Palestinian prisoners. Ben-Gvir resigned over deal; far-right ministers quit. ICRC oversaw transfers; called for privacy and dignity. Qatar PM called for immediate phase-two talks.
hostage_counts_by_phase: Plan: 33 hostages (30:1 civilian / 50:1 soldier); Day 1: 3 / 90; Feb batch: 3 / 183; Aggregate: 38 (33 Israeli + 5 Thai) / ~2,000

label: Oct 2025 Final Ceasefire
short_summary: All 48 remaining hostages (20 known alive) required within 72 hrs of redeployment. Israel to release 250 security prisoners + 1,700 adults + 22 minors detained in Gaza + bodies of 360 fighters. US deployed coordination task force (up to 200 troops to Israel). Mediators signed at Sharm el-Sheikh with Trump. 20 living released Oct 13; ~2,000 Palestinians freed.
hostage_counts_by_phase: Requirement: 48 within 72 hrs (20 known alive); Executed: 20 living / ~2,000 freed; Agreement: 250+1,700+22 Palestinians + 360 fighter bodies; Remains recovery timeline uncertain
